title: cDNA Synthesis Using SuperScript™ IV
author: Roey Angel
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.brqum5ww
materials: For PCR templates > 1kb remove the RNA by adding 1 µL (2 units) of E. coli RNase H and incubate at 37 °C for 00:20:00 . Ribonuclease H (RNase H) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #18021071

steps.title: Prepare the following mixture in a PCR tube
steps.instruction: Prepare the following mixture in a PCR tube: undetermined to 4 µL, purified RNA ( 10 pg - 5 µg ; usually 200 ng for soil extract) undetermined, random hexamers (50 µM) or a gene-specific primer ( 2 µM ) undetermined, RNase free water Random hexamers Thermo Scientific Catalog #N8080127 Nuclease-free autoclaved DEPC-treated water Carl Roth Catalog #T143.1 (CAS: 7732-18-5)

steps.title: Mix gently and spin down the solution
steps.instruction: Mix gently and spin down the solution.

steps.title: Incubate the mixture at 65 °C...
steps.instruction: Incubate the mixture at 65 °C for 00:05:00 in a thermocycler and chill On ice (or in the cycler at > 4 °C ) for at least 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Prepare the following mixture and add to each tube
steps.instruction: Prepare the following mixture and add to each tube: undetermined, 5x Reaction buffer undetermined, dNTP mix, 10 mM undetermined, 0.1M DTT undetermined, RNaseOUT™ (40 U/µl) * undetermined, BSA (20 µg/µl) undetermined, SuperScript™ IV RT (200 units/μl) * Optional USB Dithiothreitol (DTT) 0.1M Solution Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #707265ML (CAS: 3483-12-3) SuperScript™ IV First-Strand Synthesis System Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #18091050 RNaseOUT™ Recombinant Ribonuclease Inhibitor Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #10777019 Bovine Serum Albumin (BSA) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #B14 dNTP Mix (10 mM each) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #R0191

steps.title: Incubate the mixture in a thermocycler...
steps.instruction: Incubate the mixture in a thermocycler at 23 °C for 00:10:00 (only if using random hexamers, skip if using a specific primer) followed by 50 °C for 01:00:00 to 03:00:00 and 80 °C for 00:10:00 . Chill On ice .

steps.title: Prepare the following mixture and add to each tube
steps.instruction: Prepare the following mixture and add to each tube: 1 µL, DNA Polymerase I reaction buffer 0.75 µL, DNA Polymerase I 0.2 µL, RNase H 3.05 µL, RNase-free water 5 µL, Template cDNA DNA Polymerase I (10 U/µL) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #EP0041 Ribonuclease H (RNase H) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #18021071 Nuclease-free autoclaved DEPC-treated water Carl Roth Catalog #T143.1 (CAS: 7732-18-5)

steps.title: Incubate for at 15 °C for...
steps.instruction: Incubate for at 15 °C for 02:00:00 followed by 00:10:00 at 75 °C for deactivation.
3. Purify the reaction through phenol/chloroform purification followed by ethanol precipitation or using a PCR purification kit.
